front: Poem: 'A Sincere Man Am I' — 'from the land where palm trees grow'
Poem: adapted by Pete Seeger into the song 'Guantanamera'
Poem: 'I Cultivate a White Rose' — given to both 'the true friend' and 'the cruel person' in 'July as in January'
Poem: 'flowered tale' about the girl from Guatemala — 'They say she died of cold / I know she died of love'
Author: essay 'Our America' opens 'the conceited villager believes the entire world to be his village'
Author: argues against US dominance in Latin America
